summary: Excellent audience capture of a high‑energy show with a rolling second set and balanced, distortion‑free sound.
review: The recording delivers a superb, well‑balanced audience pull that avoids the distortion found on other tapes of this concert. Fans note a fun, psyched atmosphere—especially in a rolling second set—making the performance feel like a highlight of an already great tour.

ai_rating.rationale: All three reviews are positive, praising both the energetic show and the high‑quality, balanced audience recording.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Balanced sound throughout, no noticeable distortion; Mr. Severson's AUD pull captures the energy superbly.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set solid, second set described as rolling and very psyched after earlier Seattle/Portland shows.
